zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffyd ap Ieaun於1505年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾時，他的父親Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan36歲，母親Annes ferch Rhys39歲。他在威爾士丹比爾聖 阿薩夫被列為bard and member of a welsh landed family 。他去世於1553年在英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffyd ap Ieaun was born in 1505, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan, was 36 and his mother, Annes ferch Rhys, was 39. His occupation is listed as bard and member of a welsh landed family  in St Asaph, Denbighshire, Wales. He died in 1553, in Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffyd ap Ieaun est né en 1505, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Annes ferch Rhys, avait 39 ans. Sa profession de son indiquée est bard and member of a welsh landed family  à St Asaph, Denbighshire, Galles. Il est décédé en 1553, à Llangollen, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffyd ap Ieaun 1505 in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan 36 und seine Mutter Annes ferch Rhys 39. sein Beruf ist als bard and member of a welsh landed family  in St Asaph, Denbighshire, Wales aufgeführt. Er starb 1553 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffyd ap Ieaun è nato il nel 1505 nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Annes ferch Rhys, aveva 39 anni. La sua occupazione è indicata come bard and member of a welsh landed family  nel St Asaph, Denbighshire, Galles. Morì nel 1553, nel Llangollen, Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffyd ap Ieaunが1505年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychanは36歳，母Annes ferch Rhysは39歳であった。ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアスト アサフでの職業はbard and member of a welsh landed family と記録されている。彼は1553年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffyd ap Ieaun(이)가 1505년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Annes ferch Rhys(은)는 39세였다. 그의 직업은 웨일스 덴비그h실르 스트 아사프에서 bard and member of a welsh landed family 이었다. 그는 1553년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffyd ap Ieaun nasceu em 1505, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Annes ferch Rhys, tinha 39 anos. Sua profissão aparece como bard and member of a welsh landed family  em St Asaph, Denbighshire, Gales. Ele faleceu em 1553, em Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffyd ap Ieaun родился в 1505 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Annes ferch Rhys, 39.  Он работал по профессии bard and member of a welsh landed family  в местности ст асаф, денбаишир, Уэльс. Он умер в 1553 г. в местности лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffyd ap Ieaun nació en 1505, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llywelyn ap Leuan ap Llewelyn Fychan, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Annes ferch Rhys, tenía 39 años. Su ocupación registrada era bard and member of a welsh landed family  en St Asaph, Denbighshire, Gales. Murió en 1553, en Llangollen, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
